key_insight: VeriEvol scales multimodal mathematical reasoning by making both the prompts harder and the answers more reliable before RL training.
engineering_relevance: It offers a plug-in data-construction pipeline that can strengthen existing GRPO-style training with verifiable, auditable supervision.
method: Type-aware evolution rewrites easy image-question seeds into harder, image-grounded prompts.
HTV-Agent verifies answers offline by requiring multi-source counter-evidence to fail to refute them.
The verified data pipeline is iterative and extensible, adding new evolution routes or verifier channels as needed.
evidence_signal: Across five visual-math benchmarks, scaling evolved SFT data from 10K to 250K raised mean accuracy from 35.42 to 54.73, and VeriEvol added +3.88 over an un-evolved RL baseline.
watch_item: The verifier depends on reliable counter-evidence sources and robust hypothesis tests, so implementation quality may strongly affect scalability and false-accept rates.
paper_title: VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct
